hero.description: Welcome to Nocte Syndikate, my web design and graphic design agency based in Toulouse, France.

build.title: WHAT I BUILD
build.titleMarquee: WHAT I BUILD - WHAT I BUILD - WHAT I BUILD
build.description: I design digital identities and experiences from A to Z : from strategic thinking to logo creation, website development, and custom software built for your business. I also support your brand day to day through branding, maintenance, and social media management.

card1.title: Become Instantly Recognizable
card1.desc: Logos, typography, illustrations, business cards and all other visuals designed to make your brand impossible to ignore.

card2.title: Websites That Convert & Impress
card2.desc: Modern websites built to inspire trust, engage visitors and turn attention into action.

card3.title: Create a Powerful Presence
card3.desc: Creative direction, aesthetics and brand consistency designed to elevate your image online or offline.

card4.title: Software Built Around You
card4.desc: Custom tools, dashboards and all business software designed specifically to improve and automate your workflow.

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.titleMarquee: ABOUT ME - ABOUT ME - ABOUT ME
about.description:
I’m Tristan, founder of Nocte-Syndikate.
I blend design, development and strategy to create brands and websites that stand apart.

My work lives between aesthetics and engineering,
where visual identity meets clean code, motion and functionality.

I don’t build generic websites from templates. Every project has its own voice.
My role is to understand who you are,
and shape my creative direction around your brand, audience and story.
I craft digital presence with personality.

design.title: DESIGN DRIVEN
design.desc:
Strong visual identity with purpose.
Aesthetics meet strategy where every detail matters.

dev.title: DEVELOPER AT HEART
dev.desc:
Clean code, performant, and scalable.
I code to build seamless digital experiences.

custom.title: CUSTOM MADE
custom.desc:
No templates, no shortcuts.
Pure custom work, built for you.

details.title: OBSESSION WITH DETAILS
details.desc:
Motion, typography, interactions.
I focus on details to bring your brand to life.

work.title: SELECTED WORK
work.description: A selection of recent projects showcasing my design approach: creating distinctive identities, immersive web experiences, and digital solutions built to leave a lasting impression while achieving real business goals.

nuke.desc: Nuke Winter is an online escape game set in a post-apocalyptic world. The goal was to craft a strong 16-bit pixel visual identity alongside an immersive web experience, enhanced through both visuals and sound design, capable of instantly drawing users into a cold, dark and oppressive atmosphere.

cyber.desc: Cyber Resume is an experimental online resume / portfolio imagined as a personal showcase beyond traditional standards. This project combines interactive design, fluid 3D animations and a retro-futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic to transform a simple presentation into a true digital experience.

efsf.desc:
E-Formation Sans Frontière is a modern platform developed to elevate a tech training offer.
The project focused on refreshing and modernizing the brand image while maintaining a professional, trustworthy and dynamic tone, supported by a clear conversion-focused interface.

coaction.desc:
CO-Action Coaching is a visual identity designed for a coach who supports professionals in stepping back, gaining clarity, and moving toward a situation that better aligns with their needs.
The objective was to translate this approach into a modern, calm, and structured identity. The work focused on creating an elegant and readable visual universe, designed to inspire trust, reflect the human dimension of the coaching, and establish the brand’s credibility.

process.title: PROCESS
process.description: My workflow from concept to launch

step1.title: FIRST STEPS
step1.desc: I start by understanding your brand, your goals, your audience and your vision.

step2.title: CONCEPTS
step2.desc: I explore ideas and craft multiple logo concepts aligned with your brand identity.

step3.title: REFINEMENT
step3.desc: I refine the chosen direction based on your feedback to achieve the perfect result.

step4.title: FINALIZATION
step4.desc: I finalize all assets and prepare them for use across all your platforms.

step5.title: DELIVERY
step5.desc: You receive a complete brand package, ready to elevate your business.

step1.title: FIRST STEPS
step1.desc: Deep dive into your brand, your goals, your audience and your vision for your future website.

step2.title: WIREFRAME
step2.desc: Structuring the layout and user experience before applying visual design.

step3.title: DESIGN
step3.desc: Crafting the high-end visual interface matching your brand identity.

step4.title: DEVELOPMENT
step4.desc: Translating the design into clean, performant, and scalable code.

step5.title: LAUNCH
step5.desc: Final testing and deployment to ensure a flawless public release.

tailored.title: TAILORED TO YOU
tailored.desc: Every project is unique. Timelines may vary depending on the scope and complexity.

transparent.title: CLEAR & TRANSPARENT
transparent.desc: You're involved at every key step. Feedback drives the best results.

contact.title: LET'S TALK
contact.titleMarquee: LET'S TALK - LET'S TALK - LET'S TALK
contact.desc:
Have a project in mind or just want to say hello?
Fill out the form and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
Let's build something unique together.
